arts.sum: Richard Keys blasts Championship parachute payments for Leeds, Sheffield United and Burnley Leeds United’s relative strength compared to most of the rest of the Championship has been a common topic of discussion, helped significantly by the club’s relegation and parachute payments.

arts.ttl: Richard Keys namechecks Leeds United, Sheffield United and Burnley in parachute payments rant
arts.sum: The Whites will be chasing back-to-back Championship wins when they resume their promotion bid at home to Middlesbrough this evening. Sports presenter Richard Keys has referenced Sheffield United, Leeds United and Burnley in his criticism of the parachute payments system.

arts.ttl: Leeds United starter scouted by Europa League club recently, January offer on the cards
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo has been ruled out for around a month, but in the meantime, Turkish side Besiktas are reportedly interested in signing him. Besiktas scouting Leeds left-back Junior Firpo – Report

arts.ttl: Why Middlesbrough selection dilemma for Leeds is 'tough' at all
arts.sum: Dijksteel has been in fine form this season and coped excellently with Burnley's attacking threats on Friday, as well as scoring his goals. A Leeds United legend, the decision to start main competition Anfernee Dijksteel on Friday evening appeared to be a means of protecting Ayling for his emotional return.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke shares if new month-long Leeds United setback will trigger January transfer move
arts.sum: Leeds United are going to be without Junior Firpo for the next four-to-six weeks, and with January around the corner, it begs the question of what the club could do to respond to his absence. Firpo being out possibly until the back end of January does beg the question of whether Leeds and Farke might respond with a new signing.
